notes: With-skill: perfect 6/6 across all 3 evals — structured card, zone taxonomy, live P&L all present
Without-skill: consistent 3/6 — always fails status_card_present, zone_classified, shows_pnl
The three failing assertions without skill are all format/structure driven — the skill provides the output contract
flags_earnings_risk passes without skill too (C eval) — earnings awareness doesn't require the skill, but the structured zone + P&L do
With-skill runs are ~30s faster on average despite doing more work (running check_position.py) — the skill's clear instructions reduce exploration time
shows_pnl is the most differentiating assertion: skill fetches live spread value via check_position.py; without skill only shows hypothetical expiry P&L
